description: LLM mock ответ заменить на реальную интеграцию
Dev-заглушка Router в Next.js-плеере для работы с фикстурами
Backend-сервис Game Engine не реализован
Backend-сервисы Catalog/Editor/Repository/Metadata не реализованы
SDK/viewers библиотека не реализована
Extension Packs архитектура описана в ADR-015 но runtime/SDK implementation отсутствует
Дублирование манифеста Antarctica нарушает SSOT
Canonical checks были красными после миграции планирования; восстановлены в TSK-20260518
InMemorySessionStore хранит состояние только в памяти и не подходит для production persistence
Readiness endpoint не проверяет фактическую загрузку game content
SDK/viewers/web-base имеет статус scaffold и не входит в canonical runtime path
services/router отсутствует в текущей структуре и должен быть явно классифицирован как archived target или contracts-only scaffold
Payment stub для test VPS создает paid order/purchase без Robokassa и должен быть удален или закрыт production policy
Полноценный runtime-api plugin runner не реализован; серверные расширения пока ограничены manifest/platform capabilities и отдельно согласованными исключениями
Deprecated readCardFlags export was removed after current player-web and Antarctica plugin verification; current runtime/player behavior must not read flags.cards

All 7 Ajv validators moved from strict:false to strict:true (+allowUnionTypes +ajv-formats); strictTypes fixed in game-manifest.schema.json (type:object on agentRuntime conditionals, contracts regenerated, parity green). Two documented bounded exceptions remain: (A) strictRequired:false on the 5 validators compiling schemas with legitimate declarative idioms (anyOf/not/conditional then required) where the property is defined at parent level - required is still fully enforced, low risk; (B) imperative templateId cross-key existence companion check in manifestValidation.ts which JSON Schema cannot express declaratively, low risk. strict:false is no longer used anywhere. See task Current Exception Inventory for per-site state.
UI-only actions showHint showTopBar and showScreenWithLeftSideBar were removed from Antarctica logical game manifest; hint now lives in UI manifest/Presenter state per ADR-053

editor-engine index.ts is now split into cohesive modules with index.ts as a thin re-export facade (public API preserved); remaining debt is the ~2500-line EditorWorkspace component decomposition deferred to a separate slice (Phase 4)

role inference now treats an explicit _type/role/_semantics annotation as authoritative before any heuristic; the English substring matcher remains only as a documented fallback (known limitation) when no explicit role annotation is present

All game-specific deterministic guards (board/team/teamSelection/opening) migrated to generic collectionCount/stateConditions and removed from platform schema/contracts (2026-07-04); guard/effect pointer reading unified and (guard as any) casts removed. No game-specific guard forms remain in the platform.

Status decided (2026-07-04): SDK/react-sdk and SDK/shared (zero consumers) removed from root workspaces and their exit-1 stubs no longer break aggregate builds; SDK/core kept (used by player-web for view-protocol/state) with its exit-1 neutralized. Dead dirs (react-sdk, shared, sdk-core session half) retained on disk as delete-candidates; physical deletion is the remaining optional step.

Resolved (2026-07-04) via the documented-subset option: player-web supports a documented JsonLogic subset (SUPPORTED_METRIC_JSONLOGIC_OPERATORS) and scripts/ci/validate-metric-jsonlogic-subset.js (in verify:canonical) fails if any computed-metric expression uses an operator outside it, so runtime (json-logic-js) and player-web cannot diverge.
